translation.translatedDescription:
Coffee is the kind of developer you want on your team, one of the most trustworthy and talented engineers in the space.

Honored to have him working on Abstract

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "Sauciii는 매일매일 Abstract, Pudgy 커뮤니티를 돌며 생태계 홍보, 커뮤니티 멤버 소개, 앱스트랙트에 대한 무한 쉴링을 하는 친구입니다. 이게 X(트위터) 플랫폼에서만 하면 그냥 그런가 보다 하겠는데, 한국의 모든 앱스트랙트 멤버 방에 들어가 외국인인데도 한글로 "좋은 아침, 밥 먹었어?" 등등의 언어를 구사하며 세심하게 생태계를 살핍니다.

짬 많이 먹은 원사 계급의 군인을 보는 거 같아요. ㅋㅋㅋ

저처럼 온라인에서만 활동하는 게 아니고, 오프라인에서까지 열심히 하는 친구인데.. 지난 2025 KBW 'One Earth Firework Event' 행사를 NFT 갤러리 위플에서 했을 때 직접 만난 적이 있어요. 한국어가 유창하지 않았지만 사진 찍어 달라고 하니까 사진도 찍어주고, 헤매는 사람들을 땀을 뻘뻘 흘리면서 열심히 도와줬던 기억이 있습니다. 정말 좋아 보였어요.

개인적으로 DM을 보내서 Abstract 관련 이런저런 이야기를 할 때 자세하게 들어줘서 너무 고맙게 생각하고 있습니다. 저도 본받아서 열심히 해야겠어요.

(처음 만났을 때 UFC 선수인 매랍 드발리쉬인 줄 알고 공손해진 기억이 납니다.)"
}

translation.translatedDescription:
Sauciii is a friend who roams the Abstract and Pudgy communities every day, promoting the ecosystem, introducing community members, and endlessly shilling Abstract. If this was only on the X (Twitter) platform, it would be just another thing, but he goes into all the Abstract member rooms in Korea, and even though he's a foreigner, he uses Korean to say things like "Good morning, have you eaten?" and meticulously takes care of the ecosystem.

It's like watching a seasoned warrant officer in the military. lol

He's not just active online like me, but also works hard offline. I met him in person at the 'One Earth Firework Event' during the 2025 KBW, which was held at the NFT gallery Weeple. Although his Korean wasn't fluent, he took pictures when I asked him to, and I remember him sweating profusely while helping people who were lost. He seemed really great.

I'm personally grateful that he listens in detail when I send him DMs to talk about Abstract-related things. I should learn from him and work hard too.

(I remember being polite when I first met him because I thought he was UFC fighter Merab Dvalishvili.)

data.comment: One of my best giga friend

translation.translatedContent: One of my best giga friend
translation.translatedDescription:
Genuine Giga Chad carries Abstract blood in his veins
Giga Chad is a true Abstract bloodline. We have known each other for quite a long time at Abstract, honestly I always appreciate what he brings and spreads to the Abstract community.

data.author: 0xdd9418830De1369F2ad0d8A9CAa98997675c07b4
data.subject: 0xf3a686572E41eAd94d658F67918237Faf8b641DC

translation.translatedDescription: I first met Saucii at Abstract and was in awe of the energy and culture he brought to the Abstract community. Always supportive and creating a vibe for the community. Appreciate everything you do brother.

data.author: 0xBA68C4D261220C8A22dC3A382911fd825Af9B050
data.subject: 0xf3a686572E41eAd94d658F67918237Faf8b641DC
data.metadata: {"description":"Sauciii is a standout member. Always willing to help and deeply engaged, He goes above and beyond to support and uplift others, making sure everyone feels welcome. He is creativity and talent are clear in every project. They bring fresh ideas, humor that inspire positive community vibes, and their friendly personality makes interactions genuinely enjoyable for all.​"}

translation.translatedDescription: Sauciii is a standout member. Always willing to help and deeply engaged, He goes above and beyond to support and uplift others, making sure everyone feels welcome. He is creativity and talent are clear in every project. They bring fresh ideas, humor that inspire positive community vibes, and their friendly personality makes interactions genuinely enjoyable for all.​

data.metadata: {"description":"Always see PapaSmooth whether it be on Discord or X, showcasing what it means to be a true Giga Chad. Supportive, active, helps where he can, an OG."}

translation.translatedDescription: Always see PapaSmooth whether it be on Discord or X, showcasing what it means to be a true Giga Chad. Supportive, active, helps where he can, an OG.

data.author: 0x50641a31170bdC620f1c90f00C9d8f8e6E095BD6
data.subject: 0x3D544464581a7008f2cadF4F2Bb97b9AB4f38dcD
data.metadata: {"description":"Toujours présent, toujours pertinent, Il partage un contenu de qualité qui met en valeur Abstract comme peu savent le faire. Entre pédagogie, vision et passion, il contribue activement à faire grandir la communauté et à rendre l’écosystème plus accessible à tous.\nUn créateur à suivre de près — exemplaire dans son implication et son professionnalisme"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Always present, always relevant. He shares quality content that showcases Abstract like few others can. Combining pedagogy, vision, and passion, he actively contributes to growing the community and making the ecosystem more accessible to all.
A creator to follow closely—exemplary in his involvement and professionalism.

translation.translatedDescription: Sauci, one of the first gigachads who then joined the Abstract team. He is a key player in our ecosystem, thank you also for his trust in the meme creation project. Free Saucii

data.author: 0xE88824F3B9e6dc78A83A1C57fFa72b4e0D43e731
data.subject: 0x3D544464581a7008f2cadF4F2Bb97b9AB4f38dcD
data.metadata:
{"description":"Je le vois partout sur la Timeline, chaque jour à bullpost à propos de ce qu'il aime et qu'il soutient à 100% à savoir Abstract. 

Il est un Gigachad, il l'est depuis un moment ce qui est à mes yeux un gage de qualité et de confiance en sa personne. 

Pour rappel le rôle Gigachad n'est pas attribué à n'importe qui au sein d'Abstract, et peut être retiré à tout moment, il a su le garder tout ce temps, de part son activité et son engagement. 

Respect"}

translation.translatedDescription:
I see him everywhere on the Timeline, every day bullposting about what he likes and what he supports 100%, namely Abstract.

He is a Gigachad, he has been for a while, which in my eyes is a guarantee of quality and confidence in him.

As a reminder, the Gigachad role is not assigned to just anyone within Abstract, and can be withdrawn at any time. He has managed to keep it all this time, due to his activity and commitment.

Respect
